name: Best Ghost
description: Race against your personal best ghosts in Geometry Dash

ghost-recording.name: Record Ghost
ghost-recording.description: Enable recording of your best runs.

fix-fps-offset.name: Fix Offset Issues (60 FPS)
fix-fps-offset.description: Ensures the offset remains consistent regardless of your monitor's refresh rate.

ghost-offset.name: Ghost X-Offset
ghost-offset.description: How far behind the ghost is (negative is behind).

show-indicator.name: Show Status Label
show-indicator.description: Toggle the 'BestGhost: ACTIVE' text at the bottom.

open-library.name: Open Ghost Library
open-library.description: Click to open the folder where .ghst files are stored.
